_comment: Single source of truth for STT (speech-to-text) per-(provider, model) attributes. Pricing is USD per minute of audio. Mirrors models.json layout but separate file because STT has different attributes (per-minute pricing, no token caps).

models.label: GPT-4o transcribe (diarize)
models.notes: Same accuracy as gpt-4o-transcribe + speaker diarization (Speaker 1 / Speaker 2 labels in output). Good for meetings / interviews.

models.label: Whisper
models.notes: Legacy Whisper — kept for backward compat.
